content.en:
"What, a broken stump restored the Eternal Border?"

Many high-level realm gods were dumbfounded.

Even Ye Tian was extremely shocked and couldn't believe it!

"The Eternal Realm is so huge, a stump can restore the Eternal Realm, so what a terrifying thing the body of the Eternal Realm is!"

Ye Tian felt unimaginable, and suddenly felt that everything was too dreamy.

However, Ye Tian and the other high-level realm gods continued to listen to the Stasis realm gods.

The Stasis God continued, "What is the origin of that broken stump, we can't figure it out now. However, this time we probed the power of the broken stump to be triggered, creating a special area. At present, the demon seeds of the Demon Seed Abyss are also trying to control the stump, so we must take this stump first. "

Then.

A high-level realm god asked, "Stasis Realm God, this meeting is just to discuss this issue, it doesn't seem to have anything to do with us top forces, right?"

The other high-level realm gods were also very puzzled, after all, there were many high-level realm gods and peak realm gods of the supreme forces, where did they still need these high-level realm gods!

If even the Peak Realm Gods can't take away the broken stump, then they can't do it!

The Stasis Realm God smiled 163 and said, "In that area, only high-level realm gods are qualified to enter, but we don't know what to do if we can take away the broken stump, but the more high-level realm gods go, maybe which high-level realm god will be able to take away the stump." So, this is also an experiment, and maybe there is a great opportunity in it, and it is also an opportunity for you. "

Opportunity!

The high-level realm gods present were all excited, maybe they were the lucky ones!

That stump can restore the Eternal Realm, this is simply a treasure that transcends the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm, once they control such a treasure, wouldn't their strength be able to improve by leaps and bounds, and it is also very simple to become a peak realm god in the future!

So, they looked forward to it.

However.

Many high-level realm gods were not excited, but frowned.

They felt that these supreme forces had definitely gone to study the stump a long time ago, but obviously there was no way to take it away, so they let the high-level realm gods of the top forces give it a try, otherwise such a good opportunity would not be the turn of the top forces!

But if you can't research anything, it's in vain.

"Stasis Realm God, when will you go to that special area formed by the stumps?"

Another high-level realm god asked.

"After this meeting, you go back and get ready and take care of some things. After all, you're probably going to be in that area for a long time, and you'll have to get things done. For example, in the realm of the boundary crack, there must be a certain amount of manpower, and so on. You don't need to go all together, you can enter in batches. Wait, once you enter it, if you come out again, you won't be able to enter it again, you will be resisted by that special area, even if you are a peak realm god, you can't resist the power of the stump, you can't enter. "

Stasis God reminded.

"I'll find out!"

These high-level realm gods answered.

Subsequently.

These high-level realm gods left one by one and went back to deal with things.

And Ye Tian also went back, it was not yet the time to enter that special area at the earliest, and when the time was up, he would go over as soon as possible.

Of course.

He won't bring his wife and children with him, after all, he still doesn't know where it is, whether it's a chance or not, and after a thorough understanding, if it's really a chance, let his wife and children go over.

......

Soon, the time that the Supreme Forces said had come.

At this time, Ye Tian can go there, if it is a little later, but he naturally wants to go over as soon as possible!

Wow!

Ye Tian kept shuttling and finally came to the Realm Court Headquarters.

At this time, the supreme forces have already built a large array here to connect to that special area, and this large array can also directly connect to the origin of the eternal realm, and open such a large array (AFCD), which is very costly.

But the supreme forces can get such a foundation, if the top forces are allowed to build such a big array, they can't build it out of bankruptcy!

"Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

The Guya Realm God appeared beside the Ye Heaven Realm God and shouted.

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The Guya Realm God followed Ye Tian in, but the Guya Realm God was not himself, he also brought other high-level realm gods of the Dongwu Ancient Sect.

This time, the Dongwu Ancient Sect directly dispatched sixteen high-level realm gods, which shows the importance attached to that stump.

Whew![]

Many high-level realm gods passed through the great array and teleported.

Rumble!!!!

This inheritance array directly broke through the rules of the Eternal Realm and went directly to the Origin Space of the Eternal Realm.

The layers of impregnable barriers were as if they were empty in front of the teleportation power of this large array, and in this area, high-level realm gods could not enter by their own strength.

But now, relying on the Great Array, these high-level realm gods have easily come in.

Click!

A special barrier was broken.

Suddenly, many high-level realm gods came to a special area.

As soon as they entered, they felt an unimaginable oppression.

An unimaginable force seemed to ravage them and make them move their bodies, and it was not very easy.

But as time went by, they gradually got used to it, but they definitely couldn't play too strong here.

Of course, they don't need to show any strength here, and they're not here to fight, but to study the stump.

At this time.

All the high-level realm gods sensed the power of the stump, and the power of the stump was everywhere here, but the most central position was the stump, and the power there was the most intense and powerful.

But even the pinnacle realm god couldn't touch the stump.

Whoa!!!

After these high-level realm gods entered here, they separated one by one, and they were ready to find a suitable place to study.

Ye Tian was also separated from the Guya Realm Gods and kept advancing, but the closer he got to the stump, the more powerful the suppression became.

Until a moment later, he couldn't move on.

"Let's do our research right here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately.

His will continued to penetrate it, and he vaguely observed the stump.

At this moment, he really saw the appearance of this stump clearly.

A crooked branch, and the stump was very strong, and it was covered with countless cracks.

However, such an ordinary-looking stump contains such terrifying power.
